CJO Global's team can provide you with China-related cross-border trade risk
           management and debt collection services, including:
           (1) Trade Dispute Resolution
           (2) Debt Collection
           (3) Judgments and Awards Collection
           (4) Anti-Counterfeiting & IP Protection
           (5) Company Verification and Due Diligence
           (6) Trade Contract Drafting and Review

If you need our services, or if you wish to share your story, you can contact our Client
           Manager Susan Li (susan.li@yuanddu.com).
